rationale: In the citing paper, Valsesia, Proserpio, and Nunes (2020) appears in grouped method citations used to justify standard control-variable choices (e.g., text/word length and timing variables). The paper does not discuss this specific study's core theory or findings in the conceptual framing, hypothesis development, or interpretation of results. Because the reference serves as a generic prior-example support citation rather than a distinct building block, the role is best classified as a passing mention.
